title: TermNode
description: A term as projected by causality/term_economy.py. A VIEW over the repo bytes its evidence resolves against — never a source of truth. authored fields come from the seed; class/senses/counts are folded from resolved evidence.

class.description: DERIVED from resolved evidence by classify(); never authored directly.

local_meaning.description: authored (seed): what the term means in its home stratum.

global_meaning.description: authored (seed): what it means across ontum.

must_not_mean.description: authored (seed): at least one guard. A term with no must-not-mean has no boundary.

senses.description: DERIVED: distinct meaning-clusters found across the term's resolved evidence. >=2 with an incompatible flag drives the overloaded class.

resolved_count.description: DERIVED: how many citations resolved against committed bytes.

$comment: Invalid: a class outside the enum; resolved_count > evidence_count; a class you cannot reproduce from the term's EvidenceEdges.
